fields.Name: Entity Vector Sync - Daily
fields.Description: Daily vector-sync run for all Active Search-type Entity Documents (e.g. MJ Entities Search). Embeds new/changed records via the EntityDocument's configured embedding model and writes the vectors back to MJ: Entity Record Documents.VectorJSON. RunImmediatelyIfNeverRun=true so a fresh install runs the sync on first poll instead of waiting up to 24h. Driven by the existing Vectorize Entity action via the generic ActionScheduledJobDriver — no bespoke driver class needed.
